description_long: This apartment building is a modern high-rise structure with a striking geometric facade, featuring alternating black and white vertical and diagonal elements. The building has multiple stories, each with large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light and a sense of openness. Balconies are present on several floors, with some sections incorporating greenery, adding a touch of nature to the urban design. The roof is flat and includes mechanical or utility structures, typical of contemporary apartment complexes. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and a mix of opaque and transparent surfaces. The building's exterior materials appear to be primarily glass, concrete, and metal, giving it a sleek and durable appearance.
description: A modern high-rise apartment building with a geometric black-and-white facade, large windows, and multiple balconies. The structure features clean lines, a flat roof, and a mix of glass, concrete, and metal materials.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's striking geometric facade, with prominent black and white diagonal patterns and visible balconies on the right side.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the building with extensive glass windows and a series of balconies, as well as some greenery integrated into the design.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a more uniform window arrangement and the full width of the building, with less emphasis on the geometric facade.
description_view_3: This side view displays a simpler, more solid wall with fewer windows and balconies, emphasizing the building's mass and height.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with some vertical and horizontal alignment, interspersed with solid facade elements and balconies. The arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with some variation due to the geometric design.
